# GauravKeshRoushan

## Full-Stack Developer\_

I'm a Full-stack software developer passionate about building scalable solutions in health tech, AI, and SaaS. I focus on creating robust, production-ready systems that deliver real-world impact.

[View More](https://www.gkrcoder.me/about)

[Get In Touch](https://www.gkrcoder.me/contact)

[GitHub](https://github.com/gauravkesh)[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/gkrcoder)[Twitter](https://twitter.com/gkrcoder_)

Stack

TypeScript

React

Next.js

Node.js

PostgreSQL

Builder

Projects

### Rate Limiter (Go + Redis)

A scalable rate limiting service using Redis to control request throughput in distributed systems.

Go

Redis

Backend

Key features

- Request rate limiting using Redis
- Middleware-based integration
- Configurable limits and refill rates

[Code](https://github.com/GauravKesh/rate-limiter)

![Multithreaded TCP Server](https://www.gkrcoder.me/images/webp/tcp.webp)

systems

docs

[View Details](https://www.gkrcoder.me/projects/multithreaded-tcp-server) Quick View

### Multithreaded TCP Server

Concurrent TCP server with thread pool and efficient socket handling.

C++

Sockets

Concurrency

Key features

- Thread pool architecture
- Efficient I/O handling
- Low latency communication

[Code](https://github.com/GauravKesh/cpp-multithreaded-tcp-server)

![API Gateway](https://www.gkrcoder.me/images/webp/api_gateway_image.webp)

infra

docs

[View Details](https://www.gkrcoder.me/projects/api-gateway) Quick View

### API Gateway

A centralized API gateway for handling routing, authentication, and request management in microservices.

Node.js

Express

Microservices

Key features

- Centralized request routing
- Authentication and middleware support
- Basic rate limiting

## I design and build interfaces that feel intentional.

Full-stack developer specializing in clean systems, product-focused experiences, and polished front-end details.

## GKR

Full-stack developer building modern digital products with a strong focus on clarity, performance, and useful motion.
